[Mon 2026-04-27 11:18 GMT+1] when i do a cron job where will u reminde me here ? or what

When you schedule a cron job (like a reminder) with me, I'll remind you in the same place where the request was made. For example, if you ask me here (on WhatsApp), the reminder will be delivered here as well—unless you explicitly set another target or destination.
